description_long: This house features two rectangular, flat-roofed structures joined at an angle, forming an L-shaped layout. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light beige and tan, with visible weathering and some surface damage, suggesting age or neglect. The front facade includes large glass windows and arched doorways, with a prominent awning and scattered debris on the ground, adding to the sense of urban wear. Metal rods and cables protrude from the building, possibly for utility or structural support. The rear and side walls are mostly plain, lacking windows or decorative elements, and the roof surfaces are flat and utilitarian. The house sits on a textured, dark green base that resembles urban pavement or a courtyard.
description: A weathered, L-shaped house with flat roofs, large glass windows, arched doorways, and scattered debris, set on a textured urban base.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing large glass windows, arched doorways, awnings, and scattered debris.
description_view_1: Rear view with plain, windowless walls and flat roofs, showing minimal architectural detail.
description_view_2: Back corner view highlighting the plainness of the rear and side walls, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Side view showing arched windows and doors, as well as the connection between the two building volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entryway with a metal awning, steps, and scattered debris, lacking decorative columns or porch.
